description: A selfie-style shot shows a man and a woman in the foreground, with a large stone gateway and many people in the background. The man, wearing a grey baseball cap, is on the left, and the woman, who is winking, is on the right. They are on a pathway leading towards the ornate historical gateway, which has carvings and flags. Other tourists are walking in both directions on the pathway and through the archway.
location_context: This image appears to be taken at Mdina Gate, the main entrance to the old walled city of Mdina, Malta.
